base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dungeon_temple_fiends_past — a tile from 1987 final fantasy. Temple of Fiends (past) — final dungeon, 2000 years ago, where Chaos awaits. Tall 4480px canvas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
